title: The Keeper's Hand

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: If not for the Keeper’s hand, where would we stand?
The flood would rise, the earth would shake,
and none would withstand.
But through the shadows, a light breaks free,
A beacon of hope, steadfast as the sea.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Against the tides, against the roar,
A shield unseen, forevermore.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Our help is in the name of the Eternal,
Maker of the mountains, Keeper of the skies.
When the snares of fate sought to claim our spirit,
We rose unbroken, carried by His might.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The enemy's trap was set, teeth poised to tear,
But the chains were shattered, we breathed free air.
Like a bird from a hunter’s cruel cage we flew,
The sky wide and open, the dawn breaking through.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Through trials deep, through fire's flame,
The Keeper stood, unyielded, the same.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Our help is in the name of the Eternal,
Maker of the mountains, Keeper of the skies.
When the snares of fate sought to claim our spirit,
We rose unbroken, carried by His might.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Oh, if not for His hand, the story would end,
But the night turns to day, and wounds start to mend.
He is the lifeline, the anchor, the flame,
Our unyielding fortress, ever the same.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Our help is in the name of the Eternal,
Maker of the mountains, Keeper of the skies.
When the snares of fate sought to claim our spirit,
We rose unbroken, carried by His might.

sections.label: Outro
lines: We rose unbroken, carried by His might...

epigraph: Our help is in the name of the LORD
